message:
fix(clippy): resolve all 11 warnings in fr-command

- Collapse 5 nested if-statements using Rust 2024 let-chains
- Replace manual RangeInclusive check with is_ascii_digit()
- Use repeat_n() instead of repeat().take()
- Remove unnecessary let binding
- Use strip_prefix() instead of manual prefix stripping
- Suppress 1 collapsible_if where inner if has a side-effect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
